Project: libknock
Purpose: Embeddable TCP pre-application authentication SDK for Go applications.

Read first:
- docs/agents/AGENTS.md
- docs/agents/integration-guide.md
- docs/llms.md
- COMPATIBILITY.md
- MIGRATION.md
- docs/getting-started.md
- docs/api.md
- docs/api-surface.md
- docs/agents/task-matrix.yaml
- docs/modes.md

Normal integration:
- Use the root package.
- Prefer NewListener for server-side Go applications.
- Prefer Dialer for client-side Go applications.
- Use relay only for unmodified upstream binaries.

Do not:
- Start normal integrations from protocol/.
- Create per-connection replay caches.
- Put config-file parsing in SDK core.
- Treat auth-only or knock-auth-only as port hiding.


File map:
- Stable root API: aliases.go, auth/types.go, netx/listener.go, netx/dialer.go
- Normal integration entry points: docs/getting-started.md, docs/api.md, docs/api-surface.md, examples/
- Mode implementation: gate/, relay/, firewall/, knock/
- Wire/internal implementation: protocol/, internal/
- Docs to update when API changes: README.md, docs/api.md, docs/api-surface.md, COMPATIBILITY.md, docs/zh-cn/api.md

Stable root API:
- aliases.go
- auth/types.go
- netx/listener.go
- netx/dialer.go

Normal integration should not start from:
- protocol/
- internal/

Mode implementation:
- gate/
- relay/
- firewall/

Docs to update when API changes:
- README.md
- docs/api.md
- docs/api-surface.md
- docs/agents/task-matrix.yaml
- COMPATIBILITY.md
- docs/zh-cn/api.md

Agent task index:
- TCP listener: docs/agents/recipes/tcp-listener.md -> examples/tcp-echo-server/, examples/custom-binary-protocol/
- TLS/HTTP: docs/agents/recipes/tls-http-server.md -> examples/tls-server/, examples/tls-client/, examples/http-client/
- gRPC: docs/agents/recipes/grpc-server.md and docs/agents/recipes/grpc-client.md -> examples/grpc-server/, examples/grpc-client/, test/integration/grpc/
- Relay gateway: docs/agents/recipes/relay-gateway.md -> cmd/knock-proxy/, docs/gate-and-relay.md
- Knock auth-only: docs/agents/recipes/knock-auth-only.md -> docs/modes.md
- Firewall gate: docs/agents/recipes/firewall-gate.md -> docs/firewall.md, docs/validation-template.md
- Config mapping: docs/agents/recipes/config-mapping.md -> docs/getting-started.md#7-build-sdk-config-from-application-config

Packaging:
- Run validation commands from the workspace root.
- Keep go.work enabled when using the with-vendor archive; do not use GOWORK=off with workspace vendor mode.
- Standard archive: scripts/package-release.sh --standard-only VERSION dist/
- Standard plus vendored archive: scripts/package-release.sh --with-vendor VERSION dist/
